text.title: Prototyping Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Is a recruitment pool of 5+ participants reachable?

conclusion.verdict: apply: produce plan with fidelity-by-objective and 3-5 scenario tasks; require human review of script.
defer: a prototype without test participants is theatre; secure recruitment first.
block: refuse to start without learning objectives; route back to discovery.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, objectives present, recruitment reachable → produce plan per r1-learning-first; tasks bounded by r2-task-limit; out-of-scope named per r3-out-of-scope-named.
